email.subject: Charged twice for my order
email.body:
Hi Ridgeline team,

I just checked my card statement and it looks like I was charged twice for order ORD-10234 (the Summit 65L Backpack). Could you please refund the duplicate charge?

Thanks,
Jordan Pace

expected.issue_summary: Customer was charged twice for order ORD-10234, a Summit 65L Backpack.

meta.notes: Clear billing case: duplicate charge, all fields present.

email.subject: Order stuck in transit for two weeks
email.body:
Hello,

My order ORD-10456 for the Trailblazer Rain Jacket has been sitting in transit for two weeks with no movement on the tracking page. I need this jacket for a trip this weekend.

Can you look into what's going on?

Maria Chen

expected.issue_summary: Order ORD-10456 (Trailblazer Rain Jacket) has been stuck in transit for two weeks with no tracking movement.
expected.requested_action: Investigate the shipment and provide an updated delivery status.

meta.notes: Clear shipping case: stalled tracking, all fields present.

email.subject: Can't log into my account
email.body:
Hi there,

I've been trying to log into my Ridgeline account for the past two days and keep getting an 'invalid credentials' error. I requested a password reset email three times and none of them have arrived.

Can someone help me get back into my account?

Devon Ruiz

expected.issue_summary: Customer is locked out of their account and the password reset emails they requested never arrived.
expected.requested_action: Regain account access, e.g. by manually resetting the password.

meta.notes: Clear account case; no order referenced, so order_id and product_name are genuinely None.

email.subject: Tent pole snapped on first use
email.body:
Hello Ridgeline,

I set up my Alpine 3-Person Tent for the first time this weekend and one of the poles snapped in light wind. Order number is ORD-10789. This seems like a manufacturing defect.

Could you send a replacement pole or a new tent?

Sam Okafor

expected.issue_summary: A pole on the customer's Alpine 3-Person Tent (order ORD-10789) snapped in light wind on its first use.
expected.requested_action: Send a replacement pole or a replacement tent.

meta.notes: Clear product-defect case, all fields present.

email.subject: Question about bulk order for scout troop
email.body:
Hi,

I help run a local scout troop and we're looking to outfit about 20 kids with headlamps and mess kits for summer camp. Do you offer any discounts for bulk or group orders?

Thanks,
Taylor Brooks

expected.issue_summary: Customer is asking whether Ridgeline offers discounts for a bulk order of headlamps and mess kits for a scout troop.
expected.requested_action: Provide information about bulk or group order discounts.

meta.notes: Clear 'other' case: pre-sale policy question, no specific order or single product, so order_id and product_name are genuinely None.

email.subject: Promo code didn't apply -- need this fixed before tomorrow
email.body:
Hi, I placed order ORD-11002 last night using the code SUMMER20 for 20% off, but my card was charged the full amount. I'm leaving for a trip tomorrow morning and really need this sorted before then.

Please apply the discount and refund the difference as soon as possible.

Priya Nandan

expected.issue_summary: The SUMMER20 promo code did not apply to order ORD-11002 and the customer was charged the full price.
expected.requested_action: Apply the promo code discount and refund the difference before the customer's trip tomorrow.

meta.notes: Billing case with urgent priority; order contains an unnamed product so product_name is genuinely None.

email.subject: Late order + a quick question
email.body:
Hi Ridgeline,

My order ORD-11350 for the Trailhead Trekking Poles still hasn't shipped after 10 days. Can you tell me what's going on and get it moving?

Also, separately, do you sell replacement rubber tips for these poles?

Thanks,
Casey Lin

expected.issue_summary: Order ORD-11350 (Trailhead Trekking Poles) has not shipped after 10 days.
expected.requested_action: Provide a shipping status update and get the order moving.

meta.notes: Multi-request email: tests the tie-break rule. The primary request is the shipping delay (first actionable request); the follow-up question about replacement tips is secondary and excluded from the reference.

email.subject: Re: Return authorization for hiking boots
email.body:
Thanks for the quick reply -- actually, I'd like to exchange the boots for a half-size larger instead of a refund. Order ORD-11488, the Ridgeline Trailrunner Boots.

Best,
Elena

On Mon, Jun 30, 2026 at 3:12 PM, Ridgeline Support <support@ridgelineoutfitters.com> wrote:
> Hi Elena, thanks for reaching out. We can process a refund for your Ridgeline Trailrunner Boots (order ORD-11488) -- just confirm and we'll get it started.
>
> On Sun, Jun 29, 2026 at 9:05 PM, Elena Vogt <elena.vogt@mail.com> wrote:
> > Hi, I'd like to return my hiking boots, they don't fit well. Order ORD-11488.

expected.issue_summary: Customer wants to exchange their Ridgeline Trailrunner Boots (order ORD-11488) for a half-size larger instead of a refund.
expected.requested_action: Process an exchange for a half-size larger pair instead of the previously discussed refund.

meta.notes: Quoted reply beneath the newest message: the newest text supersedes the quoted refund request with an exchange request, which the reference must reflect.

email.subject: Need to update my shipping address before it ships
email.body:
Hi, I just placed order ORD-11601 for a Basecamp 4-Season Sleeping Bag but entered my old apartment address by mistake. Is there any way to update the shipping address before it goes out? I think it hasn't shipped yet.

Marcus Webb

expected.issue_summary: Customer entered the wrong shipping address on order ORD-11601 (Basecamp 4-Season Sleeping Bag) and wants it corrected before shipment.
expected.requested_action: Update the shipping address on the order before it ships.

meta.notes: Clear shipping case: pre-shipment address correction, all fields present.

email.subject: Do the trekking poles fit in the 45L pack?
email.body:
Hi, I'm considering buying the Trailhead Trekking Poles along with your Summit 45L Pack. Will the poles fit inside the pack, or do they need to be strapped on the outside?

Thanks,
Renee Okoye

expected.issue_summary: Customer wants to know whether the Trailhead Trekking Poles fit inside the Summit 45L Pack or need to be strapped on the outside.
expected.requested_action: Confirm whether the poles fit inside the pack or explain the recommended way to carry them.

meta.notes: Pre-sale product question; no order placed yet, so order_id is genuinely None.
